ModMetaData.name: Repair Station
ModMetaData.author: RexThar
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a Robot Repair Station for BioTech mechanoids.
When a mechanoid health drops below a configurable threshold, it will automatically seek out the nearest Robot Repair Station and begin self-repair. The station requires power and consumes steel.
Note: repairs active injuries only. Lost body parts are not regenerated.
Requires Biotech DLC.
